name: Buttery Caramel Quicks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch square pan, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the 1/3 cup brown sugar and water. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add milk all at once, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Turn dough out onto a well-floured surface.
6. Roll the dough out to a 12x10 inch rectangle.
7. Combine the 1/3 cup brown sugar, cinnamon, and pecans in a small bowl.
8. Sprinkle the mixture over the dough.
9. Roll up the dough starting with the 12-inch side.
10. Cut into 1-inch slices; place cut-side down in the prepared pan.
11. Bake at 425 degrees for 18 to 22 minutes until golden brown.
12. Turn out immediately and serve hot.
